title: ecbolium assamicum
intro: Ecbolium assamicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the northeastern parts of India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium assamicum include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
